parameters.jsonBody: ={   "prompt": "professional blog header image, {{ $('🖼️ Build Image Queries').item.json.primary_query }}, clean modern style, high quality, 1280x720",   "negative_prompt": "text, watermark, blurry, low quality",   "width": 1280, "height": 720,   "steps": 20, "cfg_scale": 7 }

={"source_url": "{{ $('🔀 Select Best Image').item.json.image_url }}", "alt_text": "{{ $('🔀 Select Best Image').item.json.image_alt }}", "title": "{{ $('✅ Parse & Validate Topic').item.json.slug || 'article-image' }}"}

={   "title": "{{ $('🔧 Assemble Final Article').item.json.title }}",   "content": "{{ $('🔧 Assemble Final Article').item.json.content.replace(/"/g, '\\"').replace(/\n/g, '\\n') }}",   "slug": "{{ $('🔧 Assemble Final Article').item.json.slug }}",   "status": "publish",   "featured_media": {{ $('🔗 Capture Media ID').item.json.media_id || 0 }},   "excerpt": "{{ $('🔧 Assemble Final Article').item.json.excerpt }}",   "meta": {     "_yoast_wpseo_title": "{{ $('🔧 Assemble Final Article').item.json.title }}",     "_yoast_wpseo_metadesc": "{{ $('🔧 Assemble Final Article').item.json.meta_description }}",     "_yoast_wpseo_focuskw": "{{ $('🔧 Assemble Final Article').item.json.focus_keyword }}"   } }
